summary: Gate N2 passed. All 11 design checks passed. 3 LOW concerns (power at 5 seeds, HateBRXplain availability, sparsemax training stability). None are blockers. Routing: proceed to scaffold (Step 11).
critical_context: N2 PROCEED: experiment design correctly tests novelty claim
C3 (sparsemax no-supervision) is critical disentanglement control — must not be removed
SRA replication (C2) must reproduce eilertsen2025aligning results as sanity check
H4 adversarial swap: uniform attention replacement, measure KL without re-encoding
W5a contingent on HateBRXplain availability; W5b (Davidson) as fallback second dataset
Proposition 1 proof must appear in manuscript Section 3
